topic: Perimeter expressions with combining like terms
latex:
A triangle has side lengths of $(3c + 4d)$ centimeters, $(f + 9c)$ centimeters, and $(f + 4d)$ centimeters. Which expression represents the perimeter, in centimeters, of the triangle?

A. $8d + 2f + 12c$

B. $9df + 13cf$

C. $10cf + 5df + 7cd$

D. $5d + 5f + 12c$
